{{VEFriendly}}
== List as of Jun 21st 2026 ==

{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Page
! Last edited to application
! User
! Global edits
! Edits in last 3 months
! Age of account
! Home Wiki
! Approved
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Ibjaja055]]
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/Ibjaja055}}}}
| [[User:Ibjaja055]]
| 29,779
| 1,100
| {{age in years and months|2021|12|04}}
| enwiki
|
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/EYo237]]
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/EYo237}}}}
| [[User:EYo237]]
| 5,957
| 829
| {{age in years and months|2020|12|10}}
| frwiki
|
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Pharouqenr]]
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/Pharouqenr}}}}
| [[User:Pharouqenr]]
| 63,241
| 6,826
| {{age in years and months|2023|11|25}}
| hawiki
|
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Nnamadee]]
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/Nnamadee}}}}
| [[User:Nnamadee]]
| 20,212
| 4,038
| {{age in years and months|2024|09|08}}
| hawiki
|
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/BnHamid]]
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/BnHamid}}}}
| [[User:BnHamid]]
| 79,742
| 4,879
| {{age in years and months|2021|01|11}}
| enwiki
|
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/ᱯᱨᱚᱯᱷᱮᱥᱥᱚᱨ]]
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/ᱯᱨᱚᱯᱷᱮᱥᱥᱚᱨ}}}}
| [[User:ᱯᱨᱚᱯᱷᱮᱥᱥᱚᱨ]]
| 2,955
| 593
| {{age in years and months|2019|02|19}}
| enwiki
|
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/sardeeq]]
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/sardeeq}}}}
| [[User:Sardeeq]]
| 30,231
| 9,377
| {{age in years and months|2025|11|06}}
| hawiki
|
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Dolphyb]]
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/Dolphyb}}}}
| [[User:Dolphyb]]
| 2,378,585
| 25,000
| {{age in years and months|2020|06|21}}
| enwiki
|Yes
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Yendifa]]
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/Yendifa}}}}
| [[User:Yendifa]]
| 7,607
| 1,067
| {{age in years and months|2024|03|16}}
| frwiki
|
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Shahidul Hasan Roman]]
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/Shahidul Hasan Roman}}}}
| [[User:Shahidul Hasan Roman]]
| 16,890
| 20
| {{age in years and months|2016|04|14}}
| bnwiki
|
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Brazal.dang]]
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/Brazal.dang}}}}
| [[User:Ballardmaize]]
| 41,851
| 11,762
| {{age in years and months|2014|07|26}}
| incubatorwiki
|Yes
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Mercyuniverse]]
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/Mercyuniverse}}}}
| [[User:Mercyuniverse]]
| 1,417
| 333
| {{age in years and months|2023|04|22}}
| metawiki
|
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Nguini Désiré]]
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/Nguini Désiré}}}}
| [[User:Nguini Désiré]]
| 2,002
| 221
| {{age in years and months|2023|03|18}}
| frwiki
|
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Agbalagba]]
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/Agbalagba}}}}
| [[User:Agbalagba]]
| 10,837
| 166
| {{age in years and months|2017|04|25}}
| enwiki
|
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Chinemeremprince]]
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/Chinemeremprince}}}}
| [[User:Chinemeremprince]]
| 16,616
| 3,513
| {{age in years and months|2022|03|05}}
| enwiki
|
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Ola.mahadi]]
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/Ola.mahadi}}}}
| [[User:Ola.mahadi]]
| 11,098
| 247
| {{age in years and months|2018|11|25}}
| enwiki
|
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Hamed Gamaoun]]
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/Hamed Gamaoun}}}}
| [[User:Hamed Gamaoun]]

|
|
|
|
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Jwale2]]
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/Jwale2}}}}
| [[User:Jwale2]]
| 26,085
| 53
| {{age in years and months|2015|01|20}}
| enwiki
|Yes
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Tmamatha]]
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/Tmamatha}}}}
| [[User:Tmamatha]]
| 7,502
| 94
| {{age in years and months|2021|02|22}}
| commonswiki
|
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/V Bhavya]]
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/V Bhavya}}}}
| [[User:V Bhavya]]
| 94,099
| 113
| {{age in years and months|2022|07|16}}
| tewiki
|
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/रोहित साव27]]
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/रोहित साव27}}}}
| [[User:रोहित साव27]]
| 104,201
| 75
| {{age in years and months|2019|01|25}}
| enwikisource
|Hi
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/muralikrishna m]]
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/muralikrishna m}}}}
| [[User:Muralikrishna m]]
| 47,892
| 2,071

| tewiki

| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/Nicole mwenge}}}}
| [[User:Nicole mwenge]]
| 8,001
| 7
| {{age in years and months|2023|08|28}}
| frwiki
|
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Albetudu]]
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/Albetudu}}}}
| [[User:Albetudu]]
| 3,018
| 34
| {{age in years and months|2019|02|18}}
| satwiki
|
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Aminwa 21]]
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/Aminwa 21}}}}
| [[User:Aminwa 21]]
| 3,720
| 79
| {{age in years and months|2021|06|30}}
| enwiki
|

| [[User:Joy Agyepong]]
| 5,457
| 8
| {{age in years and months|2016|08|27}}
| enwiki
|

| [[User:Leeturtle]]
| 4,796

| {{age in years and months|2010|10|07}}
| enwiki
|

| [[User:Mbaidoo]]

| {{age in years and months|2021|03|15}}
| enwiki
|

| [[User:Pragathi. BH]]

| commonswiki
|

| [[User:Obangmoy]]

| enwiki

| enwiki

| bawiki

| 3,097

| eswiki

| [[User:Dezedien]]
| 64,196
| 1,217
| {{age in years and months|2012|05|10}}
| arwiki

|-

| [[User:Vinoda mamatharai]]

| incubatorwiki

| [[User:Senator Choko]]

| 735

| enwiki

| [[User:Amikeco]]

| oswiki

| wikifunctionswiki

| enwiki

| frwiki

| enwiki

| enwiki

| 3,607

| hawiki

| [[User:Justwiki]]

| 3,141

| arwiki
|Yes Ar

| [[User:Kalakpagh]]
| 41,218
| 3,816
| {{age in years and months|2023|01|05}}
| wikidatawiki
|Yes

| enwiki

| [[User:Mahuta]]

| enwiki

| [[User:Maryleine]]

| frwiki

| metawiki

| 465
| {{age in years and months|2020|03|30}}
| commonswiki
|

| [[User:TypeInfo]]

| {{age in years and months|2022|07|25}}
| enwiki
|

| [[User:Mr. Snatch]]

| {{age in years and months|2022|03|17}}
| enwiki
|

| [[User:Muhdavdullahi]]

| hawiki

| [[User:Mwintirew]]

| enwiki
|

| [[User:Noooote]]

|

| [[User:Obedmakolo]]

| wikidatawiki
|

| [[User:Ogundele1]]

| enwiki
|
|-

| [[User:Orokbest1]]
| 22,297
| 12,048
| {{age in years and months|2024|07|08}}
| enwiki
|Yes
|-

| [[User:Nacharhopon]]

| enwiki
|
|-

| [[User:Sir Amugi]]
| 61,597
| 1,386
| {{age in years and months|2021|01|29}}
| enwiki
|
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Tenaciuos Ntaawa]]
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/Tenaciuos Ntaawa}}}}
| [[User:Tenaciuos Ntaawa]]
| 9,207
| 862
| {{age in years and months|2024|08|13}}
| dagwiki
|
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/Vision L1]]
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/Vision L1}}}}
| [[User:Vision L1]]
| 24,397
| 1,657
| {{age in years and months|2023|03|25}}
| incubatorwiki
|
|-
| [[Hardware donation program/নৰুনা বৰুৱা]]
| {{#time:H:i, j F Y|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP:Hardware donation program/নৰুনা বৰুৱা}}}}
| [[User:নৰুনা বৰুৱা]]
| 15,940
| 6,296
| {{age in years and months|2025|03|27}}
| aswiki
|
|}
